article_meta.title: Venezuelan Political Crisis Trump declares 'Venezuelan regime' a foreign terrorist organization, orders oil tanker block

reasoning: Multiple attribution violations by flagging quoted Trump language as author bias, plus an incorrect Omission of Source Attribution claim. One defensible Bias by Omission point, but key author-level word choice (e.g., 'regime') was missed.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Three of five items are direct quotes attributed to Trump flagged as author bias, violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items are either quoted source language or misidentified (the 'Skipper' claim is attributed in-text to the administration).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-prose bias like the loaded author usage of 'regime' to describe the Maduro government; limited other author-level bias present.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: The one defensible item (Bias by Omission) is correctly labeled; others are invalid due to attribution errors rather than mislabeling.
